subject: Re: LSJ Weather:
body:
I need the plane for the 16,17.... only if we are
guaranteed on dates otherwise after 17

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

> LSJ 
> 9:00am - noon - Heavy rain 6000 overcast / 4 miles
> visibility.
> 3:00-9:00pm for our arrival should be fine.
> 3500 scattard /  unrestricted visiblity
> high 85 degrees / lows 76 degrees.
> good weather for the week.
> 
> NOTE:
> Jeffrey 
> I would like to send the B727 autopilot control head
> out for repair.
> the altitude control padel is slightly stiff to
> move.
> Its more a nuisance than anything, we would Fed ex
> on Monday
> the 5th and return on Tuesday Dec 13.  (No loners
> are availible)
> Would this inconvenience your B727 schedule?
> please advise?
> Larry V.
> 
>

body_html:
I need the plane for the 16,17.... only if we are
guaranteed on dates otherwise after 17

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

LSJ
9:00am - noon - Heavy rain 6000 overcast / 4 miles
visibility.
3:00-9:00pm for our arrival should be fine.
3500 scattard / unrestricted visiblity
high 85 degrees / lows 76 degrees.
good weather for the week.

NOTE:
Jeffrey
I would like to send the B727 autopilot control head
out for repair.
the altitude control padel is slightly stiff to
move.
Its more a nuisance than anything, we would Fed ex
on Monday
the 5th and return on Tuesday Dec 13. (No loners
are availible)
Would this inconvenience your B727 schedule?
please advise?
Larry V.
